title: Cryptographic Hashes, SHA-2, SHA-3, and Commitment Boundaries · Spiral Systems Review
summary: A delayed security review reconstructs cryptographic hashes, sha-2, sha-3, and commitment boundaries from threat, algorithm, parameter, implementation, key-custody, failure, test-vector, operations, and stakeholder evidence, then challenges one retained misconception. Planned artifact: Extend the evidence record for hash-purpose and digest verification contract after a delayed changed case. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evide…
objectives: Distinguish preimage, second-preimage, collision, length, domain, and security-strength properties required by a use case.
Select supported SHA-2 or SHA-3 functions and output lengths from protocol, interoperability, performance, compliance, and security needs.
Hash bounded streams incrementally, propagate read errors, freeze canonical byte identity, and compare expected digests safely.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

steps.title: Cryptography and Go Crypto Go Hash Properties · changed case · Review Crypto Go Hash Properties
steps.instruction:
review case — A review cryptographic engineering team handles case 5380 during a credential migration window. Build deterministic Go evidence to select a hash by purpose while rejecting weak algorithms, ambiguous bytes, and unauthenticated digest claims; cap bytes, work, memory, time, attempts, concurrency, and retained secret material before use; then double attacker-controlled size or work and remain inside the admission budget. Browser code uses pure state models or the narrow side-effect-free crypto allowlist with fixed fixtures. Production entropy and keys, secret custody, native timing and side channels, networks, TLS, HSM/KMS, certificate systems, FIPS or compliance state, load, faults, restore, and production behavior require explicit authorized transfer gates. Competency probe: Distinguish preimage, second-preimage, collision, length, domain, and security-strength properties required by a use case.

Which action demonstrates Crypto Go Hash Properties without dropping earlier contracts?

content.title: Evidence defense
content.text: Use the case, one assumption, one observable result, and one limitation. Do not copy the competency statement: Require an authenticated trusted expected digest or MAC/signature when attackers can modify both data and digest.

hints: For Cryptography and Go Record what required effort · Review Crypto Go Hash Not Authentication, name the types, ownership, and stop path, Crypto Go Hash Not Authentication precondition, or invariant that must hold.

At Cryptography and Go Record what required effort · Review Crypto Go Hash Not Authentication, trace this concrete input and predict values, errors, blocking, and output before reviewing it: A review cryptographic engineering team handles case 9193 during a certificate rollover incident. Build deterministic Go evidence to select a hash by purpose while rejecting weak algorithms, ambiguous bytes, and unauthenticated digest claims; keep browser execution deterministic and move production entropy, native timing, non-allowlisted crypto, network, HSM, and compliance claims to authorized transfer gates; then double attacker-controlled size or work and remain inside the admission budget. Browser code uses pure state models or the narrow side-effect-free crypto allowlist with fixed fixtures. Production entropy and keys, secret custody, native timing and side channels, networks, TLS, HSM/KMS, certificate systems, FIPS or compliance state, load, faults, restore, and production behavior require explicit authorized transfer gates. Competency probe: Require an authenticated trusted expected digest or MAC/signature when attackers can modify both data and digest.

For Cryptography and Go Record what required effort · Review Crypto Go Hash Not Authentication, challenge the documented misconception with runtime, failure, race, or toolchain evidence: Publishing a checksum next to a file proves the file is authentic.
